节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module is used to obtain package information of various applications installed on the current device.
Used to query the enumeration value of bundleInfo. Multiple values can be passed in the form. Multiple value input, such as GET_BUNDLE_INFO_DEFAULT | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_APPLICATION.
Used to obtain the default bundleInfo. The obtained bundleInfo does not contain information of signatureInfo, applicationInfo, hapModuleInfo, ability, extensionAbility and permission.
Used to obtain the bundleInfo containing applicationInfo. The obtained bundleInfo does not contain the information of signatureInfo, hapModuleInfo, ability, extensionAbility and permission.
Used to obtain the bundleInfo containing hapModuleInfo. The obtained bundleInfo does not contain the information of signatureInfo, applicationInfo, ability, extensionAbility and permission.

Used to obtain the bundleInfo containing ability. The obtained bundleInfo does not contain the information of signatureInfo, applicationInfo, extensionAbility and permission. It can't be used alone, it needs to be used with GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE. such as GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_ABILITY | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE.

Used to obtain the bundleInfo containing extensionAbility. The obtained bundleInfo does not contain the information of signatureInfo, applicationInfo, ability and permission. It can't be used alone, it needs to be used with GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE, such as GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_EXTENSION_ABILITY | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE.
Used to obtain the bundleInfo containing permission. The obtained bundleInfo does not contain the information of signatureInfo, applicationInfo, hapModuleInfo, extensionAbility and ability.

Used to obtain the metadata contained in applicationInfo, moduleInfo and abilityInfo. It can't be used alone, it needs to be used with GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_APPLICATION, GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE, GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_ABILITY, GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_EXTENSION_ABILITY, such as GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_APPLICATION | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_METADATA or GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_ABILITY | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_METADATA or GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_EXTENSION_ABILITY | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_METADATA.

Used to obtain the default bundleInfo containing disabled application and ability. The obtained bundleInfo does not contain information of signatureInfo, applicationInfo, hapModuleInfo, ability, extensionAbility and permission.
Used to obtain the bundleInfo containing signatureInfo. The obtained bundleInfo does not contain the information of applicationInfo, hapModuleInfo, extensionAbility, ability and permission.

Used to obtain the bundleInfo containing menu configuration in hapModuleInfo. The obtained bundleInfo does not contain the information of applicationInfo, extensionAbility, ability and permission. It can't be used alone, it needs to be used with GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE, such as GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_MENU | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE

Used to obtain the bundleInfo containing router map configuration in hapModuleInfo. The obtained bundleInfo does not contain the information of applicationInfo, extensionAbility, ability and permission. It can't be used alone, it needs to be used with GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE, such as GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_ROUTER_MAP | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE

Used to obtain the skillInfo contained in abilityInfo and extensionInfo. It can't be used alone, it needs to be used with GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE, GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_ABILITY, GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_EXTENSION_ABILITY, such as GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_SKILL | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_ABILITY or GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_SKILL | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_HAP_MODULE | GET_BUNDLE_INFO_WITH_EXTENSION_ABILITY
Used to obtain the bundleInfo containing hapModuleInfo of entry. The obtained bundleInfo does not contain the information of signatureInfo, applicationInfo, ability, extensionAbility and permission.
Used to query the enumeration value of abilityInfo. Multiple values can be passed in the form.
Used to obtain the default abilityInfo. The obtained abilityInfo does not contain the information of permission, metadata and disabled abilityInfo.
Used to obtain the abilityInfo containing permission.
Used to obtain the abilityInfo containing applicationInfo.
Used to obtain the abilityInfo containing metadata.
Used to obtain the abilityInfo containing disabled abilityInfo.
Used to obtain the abilityInfo only for system app.
Used to obtain the abilityInfo with domain verification.
Used to obtain the abilityInfo with Skill
This enumeration value is used to identify various types of extension ability
Indicates extension info with type of form
Indicates extension info with type of work schedule
Indicates extension info with type of input method
Indicates extension info with type of service
Indicates extension info with type of accessibility
Indicates extension info with type of dataShare
Indicates extension info with type of filesShare
Indicates extension info with type of staticSubscriber
Indicates extension info with type of wallpaper
Indicates extension info with type of backup
Indicates extension info with type of window
Indicates extension info with type of enterprise admin
Indicates extension info with type of thumbnail
Indicates extension info with type of preview
Indicates extension info with type of print
Indicates extension info with type of share
Indicates extension info with type of push
Indicates extension info with type of driver
Indicates extension info with type of action
Indicates extension info with type of ads service
Indicates extension info with type of embedded UI
Indicates extension info with type of insight intent UI
Indicates extension info with type of FENCE
Indicates extension info with type of CALLER_INFO_QUERY
Indicates extension info with type of asset acceleration
Indicates extension info with type of form edit
Indicates extension info with type of distributed
Indicates extension info with type of the live form
Indicates extension info with type of app service
Indicates extension info with type of the web native messaging
Indicates extension info with type of the faultLog
Indicates extension info with type of the notification subscriber
Indicates extension info with type of the crypto
Indicates extension info with type of the partner agent
Indicates extension info with type of unspecified
PermissionGrantState
PERMISSION_DENIED
PERMISSION_GRANTED
Support window mode
Indicates supported window mode of full screen mode
Indicates supported window mode of split mode
Indicates supported window mode of floating mode
Launch type
Indicates that the ability has only one instance
Indicates that the ability can have multiple instances
Indicates that the ability can have specified instances
Indicates ability type
Indicates that the ability has a UI
Indicates that the ability does not have a UI
Indicates that the ability is used to provide data access services
Display orientation
Indicates that the system automatically determines the display orientation
Indicates the landscape orientation
Indicates the portrait orientation
Indicates the page ability orientation is the same as that of the nearest ability in the stack
Indicates the inverted landscape orientation
Indicates the inverted portrait orientation
Indicates the orientation can be auto-rotated
Indicates the landscape orientation rotated with sensor
Indicates the portrait orientation rotated with sensor
Indicates the sensor restricted mode
Indicates the sensor landscape restricted mode
Indicates the sensor portrait restricted mode
Indicates the locked orientation mode
Indicates the system automatically determines the sensor restricted mode
Indicates the orientation follow the desktop rotate mode
Indicates module type
Indicates entry type
Indicates feature type
Indicates shared type
Indicates bundle type
Indicates app
Indicates atomic service
Shared bundle compatible policy
Indicates that the app is a shared bundle and the shared bundle type is backward compatibility
This enumeration value is used to identify the multi app mode type.
Indicates multi app mode with type of unspecified
Indicates multi app mode with type of multiInstance
Indicates multi app mode with type of appClone
Obtains own bundleInfo.

节点.功能描述: Obtains bundleInfo based on bundleName, bundleFlags. The application requires to be a system application when requesting the permission of ohos.permission.GET_BUNDLE_INFO.
注释信息: @param { string } bundleName - Indicates the application bundle name to be queried.
@param { number } bundleFlags {@link BundleFlag} - Indicates the flag used to specify information contained in the BundleInfo objects that will be returned.
@param { AsyncCallback<BundleInfo> } callback - The callback of getting bundle info result.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700001 - The specified bundleName is not found.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700026 - The specified bundle is disabled.

parameters.说明: Indicates the application bundle name to be queried.
{@link BundleFlag} - Indicates the flag used to specify information contained in the BundleInfo objects that will be returned.
The callback of getting bundle info result.

error_codes.description: Permission denied.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.
The specified bundleName is not found.
The specified bundle is disabled.

节点.功能描述: Get AbilityInfo by the given uri.

@param { number } abilityFlags {@link AbilityFlag} - Indicates the flag used to specify information contained in the AbilityInfo objects that will be returned.
@returns { Promise<Array<AbilityInfo>> } Returns a list of AbilityInfo objects.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700003 - The ability is not found.

parameters.说明: Indicates the uri used for matching ability. The value is the same as that of the uris field under skills in the module.json5 file.

节点.return_description: Returns a list of AbilityInfo objects.

The ability is not found.

节点.功能描述: Clears cache data of the current application.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<void> } Clean bundle cache files result.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the Want for starting the main ability of own application. The main ability of an application is the ability that has the #ACTION_HOME and #ENTITY_HOME Want filters set in the application's config.json or module.json file.
注释信息: @returns { Want } the Want for starting the application's main ability.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700072 - The launch want is not found.
节点.return_description: the Want for starting the application's main ability.

error_codes.description: The launch want is not found.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the profile designated by metadata name, abilityName and moduleName from the current application.

节点.功能描述: Check whether the link can be opened.
